configurations.name: site
runtimeArgs: import os, http.server, socketserver; os.chdir('/tmp/ai-quotes-preview'); port=int(os.environ.get('PORT', '0')); socketserver.TCPServer.allow_reuse_address = True; httpd=socketserver.TCPServer(('127.0.0.1', port), http.server.SimpleHTTPRequestHandler); print('serving on', httpd.server_address[1]); httpd.serve_forever()
